## Shots and goals by team

```{r uc1}
shots_goals <- compute_team_shots_goals(events, match_id = match_id)

p1 <- viz_team_shots_goals(
  events,
  match_id = match_id,
  title = chart_titles$shots_goals,
  subtitle = subtitle,
  team_labels = team_labels
)
print(p1)
save_figure(
  p1,
  file.path(fig_dir, paste0("Shots_Goals_", slug, ".png")),
  format = "16_9"
)
```

```{r uc2}
p2 <- viz_team_shots_bar(
  shots_goals,
  title = chart_titles$shots_bar,
  subtitle = subtitle,
  fill_colors = team_colors,
  team_labels = team_labels
)
print(p2)
save_figure(
  p2,
  file.path(fig_dir, paste0("Shots_Bar_", slug, ".png")),
  format = "16_9"
)
```

## Shots per 90 minutes

```{r uc3}
p3 <- viz_player_shots_per90(
  events,
  player_match_stats_df = pms,
  match_id = match_id,
  min_minutes = 30,
  top_n = 10,
  title = chart_titles$shots_per90,
  subtitle = subtitle,
  team_labels = team_labels
)
print(p3)
save_figure(
  p3,
  file.path(fig_dir, paste0("Shots_Per90_", slug, ".png")),
  format = "4_5"
)
```

## Passes into the penalty area

```{r uc4}
top_passer <- events %>%
  filter(type.name == "Pass", is.na(pass.outcome.name), team.name == meta$home_team) %>%
  count(player.id, player.name, sort = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1)

p4 <- viz_player_pass_map(
  events,
  player_id = top_passer$player.id,
  match_id = match_id,
  title = player_chart_title(
    player_display_label(events, player_id = top_passer$player.id),
    chart_titles$pass_map_suffix
  ),
  subtitle = subtitle,
  box_only = TRUE
)
print(p4)
save_figure(
  p4,
  file.path(fig_dir, paste0("Pass_Map_", slug, ".png")),
  format = "16_9"
)
```

## Expected goal contribution

```{r uc5}
p5 <- viz_xg_xga_contribution(
  events,
  player_match_stats_df = pms,
  match_id = match_id,
  min_minutes = 30,
  top_n = 12,
  title = chart_titles$xg_contribution,
  subtitle = subtitle
)
print(p5)
save_figure(
  p5,
  file.path(fig_dir, paste0("xG_Contribution_", slug, ".png")),
  format = "16_9"
)
```

## Defensive action heatmaps

```{r uc6, fig.height=5.2}
iterate_sdc_palette(function(color_name, color_hex, palette_key) {
  p6 <- viz_defensive_heatmap(
    events,
    match_id = match_id,
    title = paste(chart_titles$defensive_heatmap, paste0("(", color_name, ")")),
    subtitle = subtitle,
    team_labels = team_labels,
    heat_color = color_hex
  )
  print(p6)
  save_figure(
    p6,
    file.path(fig_dir, paste0("Defensive_Heatmap_", slug, "_", color_name, ".png")),
    format = "16_9"
  )
})
```

## Shot map — top goal scorer

```{r uc7, fig.height=7}
scorer <- top_goal_scorer(events, match_id = match_id, team_name = meta$home_team)

iterate_sdc_palette(function(color_name, color_hex, palette_key) {
  p7 <- viz_shot_map(
    events,
    player_id = scorer$player.id,
    match_id = match_id,
    title = player_chart_title(scorer$player_label, chart_titles$shot_map_suffix),
    subtitle = subtitle,
    shot_color = color_hex
  )
  print(p7)
  save_figure(
    p7,
    file.path(fig_dir, paste0("Shot_Map_", slug, "_", color_name, ".png")),
    format = "1_1"
  )
})
```

## Shot map — body-part icons

```{r uc7-icons-setup, include=FALSE}
featured_player <- resolve_featured_player(events, params$featured_icon_player)

if (!is.null(params$featured_left_foot_player)) {
  left_foot_player <- resolve_featured_player(events, params$featured_left_foot_player)
} else {
  left_foot_shooter <- top_left_foot_shooter(
    events,
    match_id = match_id,
    team_name = meta$home_team
  )
  left_foot_player <- list(
    player.id = left_foot_shooter$player.id,
    player.name = left_foot_shooter$player.name,
    player_label = left_foot_shooter$player_label,
    slug = figure_slug(left_foot_shooter$player_label)
  )
}
```

### `r featured_player$player_label`

```{r uc7-icons-musiala, fig.height=7}
iterate_sdc_palette(function(color_name, color_hex, palette_key) {
  p7_icons <- viz_shot_map_icons(
    events,
    player_id = featured_player$player.id,
    match_id = match_id,
    title = player_chart_title(
      featured_player$player_label,
      chart_titles$shot_map_suffix
    ),
    subtitle = subtitle,
    icon_set = "footprint",
    shot_color = color_hex
  )
  print(p7_icons)
  save_figure(
    p7_icons,
    file.path(
      fig_dir,
      paste0("Shot_Map_Icons_", featured_player$slug, "_", color_name, ".png")
    ),
    format = "1_1"
  )
})
```

### `r left_foot_player$player_label` — left foot

```{r uc7-icons-left-foot, fig.height=7}
iterate_sdc_palette(function(color_name, color_hex, palette_key) {
  p7_icons <- viz_shot_map_icons(
    events,
    player_id = left_foot_player$player.id,
    match_id = match_id,
    title = player_chart_title(
      left_foot_player$player_label,
      chart_titles$shot_map_left_foot_suffix
    ),
    subtitle = subtitle,
    icon_set = "footprint",
    shot_color = color_hex
  )
  print(p7_icons)
  save_figure(
    p7_icons,
    file.path(
      fig_dir,
      paste0("Shot_Map_Icons_", left_foot_player$slug, "_", color_name, ".png")
    ),
    format = "1_1"
  )
})
```

## Shot map — pitch and goal mouth

```{r uc8, fig.height=8}
uc8_player <- resolve_featured_player(events, params$featured_icon_player)

iterate_sdc_palette(function(color_name, color_hex, palette_key) {
  p8 <- viz_shot_map_goal_net(
    events,
    player_id = uc8_player$player.id,
    match_id = match_id,
    title = player_chart_title(
      uc8_player$player_label,
      chart_titles$shot_map_goal_net_suffix
    ),
    subtitle = subtitle,
    shot_color = color_hex
  )
  print(p8)
  save_figure(
    p8,
    file.path(
      fig_dir,
      paste0("Shot_Map_Goal_Net_", uc8_player$slug, "_", color_name, ".png")
    ),
    format = "4_5"
  )
})
```

---

Figures saved to: `r fig_dir`
